metadata.title: Qvicko — Automations, E-commerce & Web Solutions
metadata.description: Qvicko by William Soderstrom. I build AI automations, custom e-commerce solutions, modern websites and digital AI services that drive growth for your business.

servicesDropdown.expertDesc: Get a dedicated expert for your project

hero.title: I build digital solutions
hero.description: Hi, I'm William Soderstrom — founder of Qvicko. I help businesses automate, sell more online and grow digitally with AI-powered solutions and modern web technology.

builder.title: Your website, live in minutes
builder.subtitle: No coding, no hassle. Describe your business and our AI builds a complete, professional website — ready to publish instantly.

speed.title: Lightning fast launch
speed.description: Go from idea to live website in under 5 minutes. AI handles the design, copywriting, and structure so you can focus on running your business.

design.title: Stunning design, every time
design.description: Every site is custom-built with modern design principles. Mobile-first, visually polished, and tailored to your brand identity.

seo.title: Built-in SEO power
seo.description: Every page is optimized for search engines from day one. Meta tags, fast load times, and structured content that Google loves.

showcase.title: From blank page to business asset
showcase.description: Watch how our AI transforms a simple description into a fully designed, responsive website. Upload your brand, add a few details — and we handle the rest.
showcase.videoHint: Tip: A short explainer or screen recording showing the AI building a real site in real-time works great here.

seoBoost.title: Supercharge your traffic with SEO landing pages
seoBoost.description: Create targeted landing pages that rank on Google and drive qualified visitors to your business. Each page is optimized for specific keywords and local search — giving your business an unfair advantage online.

point1.title: Keyword-targeted pages
point1.desc: AI generates landing pages focused on the search terms your customers actually use.

point2.title: Local SEO domination
point2.desc: Rank in your city, your neighborhood, your niche — with pages built for local intent.

point3.title: Automatic optimization
point3.desc: Pages are continuously improved based on performance data and search trends.

point4.title: Measurable results
point4.desc: Track traffic, rankings, and conversions directly from your dashboard.

simpleSteps.title: Three steps. That's it.
simpleSteps.subtitle: No meetings, no proposals, no waiting around. Just a website that works.

step1.title: Describe your business
step1.description: Tell us your company name, industry, and what makes you unique. Or paste the URL of your existing site to transform it.

step2.title: AI builds your site
step2.description: Our AI creates a complete website with design, copy, images, and SEO — all tailored to your brand in seconds.

step3.title: Publish and grow
step3.description: Go live instantly with a free subdomain, or connect your own domain. Start getting traffic and customers right away.

ctaNew.title: Your competitors already have a website. Do you?
ctaNew.description: Stop overthinking it. Get a professional, SEO-optimized website in minutes — not months. No technical skills needed.
ctaNew.note: Free to start — no credit card required

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up to access our digital services.
auth.optionalNote: These fields are optional. You can fill them in later in your profile.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.termsLinkText: terms and conditions, privacy policy and cookie policy
auth.mustAgreeToTerms: You must agree to the terms to continue

dashboard.noListings: You have no active projects yet.
dashboard.noBids: You have no active inquiries. Explore our services!

user.subtitle: Here's an overview of your website.
user.visitorsTooltip: Number of unique visitors to your website in the selected period.
user.pagesPerSessionTooltip: Average number of pages a visitor views per session.
user.performanceTooltip: A combined score based on load time (LCP, FCP) and layout stability (CLS).
user.noData: No analytics data yet. Visitors will appear once your site gets traffic.
user.tip1Desc: Compress images and enable caching to improve your website's performance and user experience.
user.tip2Desc: Add clear call-to-actions and improve navigation to keep visitors on your site longer.

admin.title: Admin overview
admin.subtitle: Overview of all clients and revenue.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. By continuing you accept our use of cookies.

collections.title: Our services
collections.description: Explore our full range of digital solutions and media services.

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Manage leads and generated websites.
leads.noLeads: No leads yet. Add a URL to get started.
leads.subject: Subject

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Inbound emails and replies from leads.
inbox.subject: Subject

userPages.title: My Pages
userPages.subtitle: Manage your websites.
userPages.noPagesDesc: When your website is ready it will appear here.
userPages.publishRequiresPlan: You need an active subscription to publish. Go to Billing to choose a plan.
userPages.deleteDescription: This action hides the website from all visitors. All connected domains and subdomains will be removed. The data is not fully deleted but the website becomes inaccessible.
userPages.deleteSlugPrompt: Type the website slug to confirm:
userPages.deleteEmailSentDesc: An email has been sent to your registered email address. Click the link in the email to confirm the deletion.

siteEditor.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or does not belong to your account.

userDomain.title: Domains
userDomain.subtitle: All domains connected to your websites.
userDomain.noDomainsDesc: When you create a website it automatically gets a free domain.
userDomain.addDomainDesc: Connect a domain you already own to your website.
userDomain.invalidDomain: Enter a valid domain, e.g. mybusiness.com
userDomain.formatHint: Enter your domain without www or https
userDomain.dnsSetupTitle: How do I connect my domain?
userDomain.dnsStep1: Log in where you bought your domain (e.g. GoDaddy, Namecheap, Cloudflare).
userDomain.dnsStep2: Go to DNS settings and add a CNAME record:
userDomain.dnsWait: DNS changes can take up to 24 hours. We will notify you when everything is ready.
userDomain.verificationRequired: Add the following DNS record at your domain registrar:
userDomain.buyDomainDesc: Search and register a new domain. DNS is configured automatically.
userDomain.tryAnother: Try a different domain or another TLD (.com, .se, .nu)
userDomain.autoRenewalDesc: Automatically renew the domain before it expires
userDomain.manualRenewalDesc: Renew the domain immediately with your registered card
userDomain.transferDomainDesc: Move the domain to another registrar

userAccount.title: Account
userAccount.subtitle: Manage your profile and settings.
userAccount.name: Name
userAccount.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

subscriptionAlert.paymentFailed: Your last payment failed. Update your card to avoid interruption.
subscriptionAlert.expiringPlan: Your plan expires in {days} days. Renew to keep your website active.
subscriptionAlert.siteDeletion: Your website is scheduled for deletion in {days} days due to unpaid invoice.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription, payment method and billing details.
billing.freePlanDesc: You have no paid plan. With the Free plan you get:
billing.trialInfoAfter: After that, 199 SEK/month will be charged automatically.
billing.confirmCancel: Are you sure? The subscription ends at the end of the current period.
billing.addCardToSubscribe: Add a payment card to upgrade your plan.
billing.cardSetupFailed: Could not save card. Please try again.
billing.billingSaveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
billing.requiresCard: Add a payment card first to choose a plan.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

claim.expiresNote: Activate to keep the site permanently.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about Qvicko. Guides for domains, websites, payments, and more.
helpCenter.heading: How can we help you?
helpCenter.subheading: Search our guides or browse the categories below.
helpCenter.noResults: No results found. Try different search terms.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been verified. You can now use all features.
verifyEmail.failed: The link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.alertMessage: We've sent a verification email to your email address. Click the link in the email to verify.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Could not send verification email. Please try again.

createSite.pageSubtitle: Get a professional website in minutes — completely free to start.
createSite.emailNote: We use your email to link the website to your account.
createSite.chooseTitle: How do you want to create your website?
createSite.optionNewDesc: Start from scratch. Describe your business and AI will create a complete website for you.
createSite.optionTransformDesc: Enter the URL of your current website and we'll build a new, modern version based on your content.
createSite.contextPlaceholder: Describe what your business does, what services you offer, what makes you unique. The more you write, the better the website will be.
createSite.contextHint: AI will expand and improve your description.
createSite.colorsSubtitle: Choose colors for your website or let us pick for you.
createSite.logoSubtitle: Upload your logo or continue without one.
createSite.scrapingSubtitle: We're reading your content, colors, and images.
createSite.generatingSubtitle: AI is designing a modern website based on your preferences.
createSite.successSubtitle: Log in or create an account to view and manage your new website.
createSite.loginToView: Log in to view your website
createSite.createAccountToView: Create account to view your website
createSite.failedSubtitle: We couldn't create your website. Please try again.

media.dragDrop: Drag and drop files here or click "Upload"
media.deleteWarning: The file will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
